prompt.content:
Using the transcript from the expert interview with Sarah McKenzie perform the following tasks:

Calculate how much Laurentian Resources Inc. saved by converting the mine to a data center instead of closing the mine as a percentage of total mine closing costs, excluding perpetual monitoring costs. Round to the nearest percent.

Assume the projected payback period is at the midpoint of the expert-stated range. Assume annual revenue is the midpoint of the expert-given range of the total annual revenue generated from converting the mine. State the projected payback period, in years, and state the annual revenue in $CAD millions, rounded to the nearest million.

Calculate the percent of annual revenue that comes from the Bitcoin mining partner and calculate the percent of annual revenue that comes from the HPC partner. List out your answers to the nearest percent. Then, calculate how much annual revenue comes from battery storage. Assume that battery storage makes up all of the remaining revenue after accounting for Bitcoin mining partner and HPC partner revenue. List out in $CAD millions, rounded to one decimal place.

Assuming the exchange rate is $1 USD to $1.40 CAD, convert the following to USD, round to the nearest USD dollar, and state the cost of the data center conversion, the estimated cost of closing the mine instead of converting it (excluding perpetual monitoring costs). 
Finally, state the total annual revenue generated from the mine conversion.

rubrics.name: States the amount Laurentian Resources Inc. saved by converting the mine into... (ver_b86f4b500e3a48698bead8f99b2e073a)

messages.content: States the amount Laurentian Resources Inc. saved by converting the mine into a data center is 4% (acceptable range 3.96% to 4.04%).
